perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a large retail warehouse aisle in front of a giant inflatable bull-shaped pool float displayed on a shelf. The woman on the right wears a white dress and a black beret, gesturing excitedly. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of the product's price tag, which shows a significant price drop, and the packaging box. (3) The women interact with each other and the product, pointing at the bull float and making heart shapes with their hands. (4) Final scene shows the woman in the beret making a playful, disappointed face while text appears over her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout the video. (2) A female voice speaks continuously in a very excited and fast-paced Mandarin tone, detailing the product features and the price discount. (3) Frequent cartoonish sound effects (boing, ding, sparkle sounds) are heard synchronized with the appearance of text overlays. (4) Muted warehouse ambient hum is audible during pauses in speech.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '超殺折扣' (Killer Discount) and '超級搶眼' (Super Eye-catching) in bold red and yellow fonts appear with a zoom effect. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue regarding the price drop from $1999 to $497. (4) Hook Text: '坐不上去!' (Can't sit on it!) appears at the end with a humorous tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Feature/Price Reveal -> Personal Commentary/Joke

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female wearing a white sleeveless dress and a black Kangol beret; one female wearing a black top and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Warehouse interior with high industrial shelving, various boxed products, and price tags characteristic of Costco.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Demo -> Price Comparison -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a high-energy shopping recommendation for a heavily discounted seasonal item (Inflatabull pool float) at Costco, leveraging the extreme price drop to generate viewer interest and potential impulse buys.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly showing the product, price tag, and urging viewers to check it out due to the low price.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin delivery, variety-show style graphic overlays, fast-cut editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'treasure hunt' content format typical of warehouse club influencers.
